text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, October 09. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. I've logged your vitals. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 4th grade level now. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I checked the recent logs for that. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Calculating some savings estimates. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Smart financial planning. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Managing some allergy issues today. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Good focus area. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing our household budget today. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. CareConnect prep is moving along. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
